name: Outscraper
description: Pay-as-you-go Google Maps scraper with built-in email/contact enrichment. Best dedicated tool for harvesting local SMB lead lists from Google Maps + Reviews + Search.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API key
credential_fields.description: Outscraper API key from app.outscraper.com → Profile → API

tools.name: google_maps_search
tools.description: Scrape Google Maps for businesses matching a query. Returns name, address, phone, website, rating, reviews count, hours, place id, lat/lng. Use `enrichment` to also pull emails and social links from each result's website.

query.description: Free-form query, e.g. 'marketing agency, Lyon, France'

fields.description: Comma-separated fields to return — restrict for cheaper queries

async.description: Return a request id immediately and poll get_request_results later

tools.name: google_maps_reviews
tools.description: Pull all reviews for one or more Google Maps places. Useful for sentiment / pain-point research before outreach.

query.description: Place URL, place id, or 'name, city'

tools.name: emails_and_contacts
tools.description: Given a list of domains, return emails (with role/title where possible), phones, and social links found on the site. Pure contact enrichment — no Google Maps needed.

query.description: Domain or comma-separated list of domains

tools.name: phones_enricher
tools.description: Find names + addresses associated with US phone numbers (whitepages-style).

tools.name: get_request_results
tools.description: Poll an async job (when `async: true` was used) for completion + results.
